tooltip.gunfireoverhaul.enableAmbientGun: Globally enables or disables the ambient gunfire sound system that plays distant shots.
tooltip.gunfireoverhaul.enableCaveSounds: Plays loud, reverberating sounds when you are in a cave.
tooltip.gunfireoverhaul.enableSurfaceSou: Plays clear gunshot sounds when you are on the surface.
tooltip.gunfireoverhaul.maxAmbientGunfir: The maximum power a random 'Heavy Caliber' tier shot can have. Affects sound choice.
tooltip.gunfireoverhaul.maxGunfireDistan: Maximum distance in blocks from the player where an ambient sound can originate.
tooltip.gunfireoverhaul.maxTimeBetweenSh: Maximum time in seconds between ambient gunfire events.
tooltip.gunfireoverhaul.minGunfireDistan: Minimum distance in blocks from the player where an ambient sound can originate.
tooltip.gunfireoverhaul.minTimeBetweenSh: Minimum time in seconds between ambient gunfire events (e.g., a single shot or a burst of fire).
tooltip.gunfireoverhaul.powerTiersHeader: Weighted chances for different caliber tiers (e.g., pistol, rifle, sniper). Affects sound selection.
tooltip.gunfireoverhaul.scenariosHeader: The chance for a scenario is its weight divided by the sum of all weights. Set a weight to 0 to disable a scenario.
